channel.title: Causal AI daily picks
channel.description: Top-5 daily picks from new research, engineering posts, and tools across causal inference, causal ML, causal language models, and online experimentation.

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-13
item.description: 1. Stable Estimation of Heterogeneous Treatment Effects — Uplift / HTE · score 48 · Semantic Scholar: heterogeneous treatment effects · Anpeng Wu, Kun Kuang, Ruoxuan Xiong, Bo Li et al. (5 authors) 2. ashuiGordon/stata-cli — Stata CLI for Agent; Stata CLI Is All Reg Monkeys Need — Other · score 30 · GitHub topic:econometrics

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-12
item.description: 1. Agent-Based Models for Causal Inference — Reweighting Data and Theory in Epidemiology — Causal Inference · score 44 · Semantic Scholar: Miguel Hernan causal inference · Miguel A. Hernán 2. The International Journal of Biostatistics CAUSAL INFERENCE When to Start Treatment ? A Systematic Approach to the Comparison of… — Causal Inference · score 44 · Semantic Scholar: Miguel Hernan causal inference · L. Cain, J. Robins, E. Lanoy, R. Logan et al. (6 authors) 3. Re: Causality and causal inference in epidemiology: the need for a pluralistic approach. — Causal Inference · score 44 · Semantic Scholar: Miguel Hernan causal inference · T. VanderWeele, M. Hernán, E. T. Tchetgen Tchetgen, J. Robins 4. Longitudinal Causal Inference — Causal Inference · score 44 · Semantic Scholar: Miguel Hernan causal inference · M. Hernán, J. Robins 5. Biases in Randomized Trials: A Conversation Between Trialists and Epidemiologists. — Experimentation · score 44 · Semantic Scholar: Miguel Hernan causal inference · M. Mansournia, J. Higgins, J. Sterne, M. Hernán

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-11
item.description: 1. Real vs. Semi-Simulated: Rethinking Evaluation for Treatment Effect Estimation — Uplift / HTE · score 68 · arXiv stat.ML · George Panagopoulos 2. What should post-training optimize? A test-time scaling law perspective — Causal LMs · score 60 · arXiv stat.ML · Muheng Li, Jian Qian, Wenlong Mou 3. When Can Digital Personas Reliably Approximate Human Survey Findings? — Causal LMs · score 60 · arXiv stat.ML · Mumin Jia, Yilin Chen, Divya Sharma, Jairo Diaz-Rodriguez 4. Extended Wasserstein-GAN Approach to Causal Distribution Learning: Density-Free Estimation and Minimax Optimality — Causal Inference · score 60 · arXiv stat.ML · Shu Tamano, Masaaki Imaizumi 5. Sample size and power calculations for causal inference with time-to-event outcomes — Causal Inference · score 60 · arXiv stat.ME · Chengxin Yang, Bo Liu, Fan Li
